mapper.select: SELECT SEQ, NAME , PARENT_SEQ , URL , MATCH_URL , DEPTH, SORTING FROM TB_MENU WHERE 1 = 1 ORDER BY `DEPTH` , SORTING

SELECT TM.SEQ, TM.NAME , TM.PARENT_SEQ , TM.URL , TM.MATCH_URL , TM.DEPTH, TM.SORTING FROM TB_USER TU INNER JOIN TB_AUTH TA ON TA.SEQ = TU.AUTH_SEQ INNER JOIN TB_AUTH_MENU TAM ON TAM.SEQ_AUTH = TA.SEQ INNER JOIN TB_MENU TM ON TM.SEQ = TAM.SEQ_MENU WHERE 1 = 1 AND TU.SEQ = 1 ORDER BY TM.`DEPTH` , TM.SORTING
